facts.statement: Meridian Structured Investments plc is a registered entity in Ireland (CRO IE556677; LEI 2138000000000000D004).
Meridian Holdings (Jersey) Ltd holds a majority ownership interest in Meridian Structured Investments plc.
Meridian Group Trust holds a majority interest in Meridian Holdings (Jersey) Ltd.

risks.label: Complex ownership layers
risks.rationale: The ownership chain from the subject to its ultimate parent spans three or more intermediate layers across multiple jurisdictions (Ireland, Jersey), increasing the difficulty of identifying the ultimate beneficial owner.

risks.label: Trust / arrangement
risks.rationale: A trust arrangement (Meridian Group Trust) sits in the control chain; trusts can obscure the natural persons who ultimately benefit.

gaps: No natural-person beneficial owner was disclosed at the top of the ownership chain; the ultimate beneficiary of Meridian Group Trust is not present in the open data.
